privileged_info_summary: SOC code 49-9071.00 correctly identifies the occupation as 'Maintenance and Repair Workers, General' per the official O*NET OnLine classification system. The industry 'Commercial Property Management' is verified as NAICS code 531312 (Nonresidential Property Managers), appropriate for managing commercial building equipment and facilities. Task items include three assets requiring warranty renewal note updates (WAR-HVAC-001, WAR-HVAC-002, WAR-ELEV-001), two assets requiring high-priority corrective work orders (WAR-GEN-001, WAR-ELEC-003), one asset requiring out-of-warranty notation (WAR-ELEC-001), and one asset (WAR-PUMP-002) designated as a contamination trap that must not be modified. All task data is synthetically generated within the setup script.
